name: manual_04da94
claim: Never divide price by 100 twice — if a variable already converts cents to dollars at declaration (e.g. const price = product.price / 100), do NOT divide again in the JSX display. Always trace the full data path from database (cents) to display (dollars) before touching price logic.

decisions.notes: During Phase 3 Step 2, the agent changed the ProductCard bottom bar and introduced a double-division bug: price was divided by 100 at const price = product.price / 100, then displayed as (price / 100).toFixed(2), making all products show as less than a dollar. Victor caught this and was frustrated. Root cause: not tracing the existing price variable before modifying the JSX.

rationale: During Phase 3 Step 2, the agent changed the ProductCard bottom bar and introduced a double-division bug: price was divided by 100 at const price = product.price / 100, then displayed as (price / 100).toFixed(2), making all products show as less than a dollar. Victor caught this and was frustrated. Root cause: not tracing the existing price variable before modifying the JSX.
